message:
ci: Add automated npm release workflow with provenance

- Add publish-cli.yml workflow triggered by cli-v* tags
- Add publish-cli.ts helper script for version bumping and tagging
- Add repository field to CLI package.json for npm provenance

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/6b19a365-edc3-4114-963c-71f6502c9c12

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+name: Publish CLI to npm
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - "cli-v*"
+
+jobs:
+  publish:
+    name: Publish to npm
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: read
+      id-token: write # Required for npm provenance
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js (for npm publish)
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Build CLI
+        run: bun run build
+        working-directory: ./packages/cli
+
+      - name: Publish to npm with provenance
+        run: npm publish --provenance --access public
+        working-directory: ./packages/cli
+        env:
+          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
